calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Jan-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Scott A. Bonzell, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CAROLE SWANN.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ACTORS THEATRE OF SAN FRANCISCO.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-30 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Carole Swann sworn and examinded on her own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $300,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $3,682.76
Total Judgment in the amount of $303,682.76
Judgment signed in open court.
